workspaces.title: Workspace
workspaces.description: Represents a website or tenant using the chatbot SDK.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this workspace.

domain.description: The domain where the SDK will be embedded.

primaryColor.description: Hex color for the chat bubble.

welcomeMessage.description: The first message shown to users.

knowledge_base.title: Knowledge Base Entry
knowledge_base.description: A piece of information used for RAG training.

workspaceId.description: The ID of the workspace this belongs to.

content.description: The actual text content or extracted data.

source.description: The source URL or file name.

chat_logs.title: Chat Log
chat_logs.description: History of a conversation between a user and the bot.

userId.description: A unique identifier for the end-user (session-based).

/workspaces/{workspaceId}/knowledge_base.description: Knowledge base entries for a specific workspace.

/workspaces/{workspaceId}/chat_logs/{log.description: Chat history for a specific workspace.
